title: Pariyur Kondathu Kaliamman
tagline: Pariyur Kondathu Kaliamman — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kondathu Kaliamman Temple is an Amman temple located at Pariyur near Gobichettipalayam in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Kondathu Kaliamman Temple is an Amman temple located at Pariyur near Gobichettipalayam in Tamil Nadu, India. There are other temples, namely Sri Amarapaneeswarar Temple, Sri Adinarayana Perumal Temple and Sri Angalamman Temple nearby.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pariyur
topPlaces.description: Pariyur is a panchayat village located near Gobichettipalayam in Erode District of Tamil Nadu state, India. It is located about 3 km from Gobichettipalayam on the way to Anthiyur via Savandapur.

topPlaces.name: Nanjai Gobi
topPlaces.description: Nanjai Gobi is a panchayat village in Gobichettipalayam taluk in Erode District of Tamil Nadu state, India. It is about 6 km from Gobichettipalayam and 36 km from district headquarters Erode.

topPlaces.name: Pavalamalai Muthukumara Swamy Temple
topPlaces.description: The Pavalamalai Muthukumara Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Murugan, located near Gobichettipalayam in Tamil Nadu. The temple is located atop of a small hillock.

topPlaces.name: Vellalapalayam
topPlaces.description: Vellalapalayam is a panchayat village in Gobichettipalayam taluk in Erode District of Tamil Nadu state, India. It is about 5 km from Gobichettipalayam and 40 km from district headquarters Erode.

topPlaces.name: Pudukaraipudur
topPlaces.description: Pudukkaraipudur is a panchayat in Gobichettipalayam taluk in Erode District of Tamil Nadu state, India. It is about 5 km from Gobichettipalayam and 35 km from district headquarters Erode.

topPlaces.name: Gobichettipalayam division
topPlaces.description: Gobichettipalayam division is one of the two revenue divisions in Erode district of Tamil Nadu State, India. This Division comprises six Taluks divided into nine CD blocks.

topPlaces.name: Gobichettipalayam Municipality
topPlaces.description: The Gobichettipalayam Municipality is the civic body that governs the town of Gobichettipalayam in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Karattadipalayam
topPlaces.description: Karattadipalayam is a village in Gobichettipalayam Taluk of Erode district in Tamil Nadu. It is part of the Lakkampatti town panchayat.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pariyur Kondathu Kaliamman?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pariyur Kondathu Kaliamman is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pariyur Kondathu Kaliamman?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (75 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pariyur Kondathu Kaliamman?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pariyur Kondathu Kaliamman at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pariyur Kondathu Kaliamman?
faq.a: Stays in Pariyur Kondathu Kaliamman start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pariyur Kondathu Kaliamman?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pariyur, Nanjai Gobi, Pavalamalai Muthukumara Swamy Temple, Vellalapalayam, Pudukaraipudur.
